# Insight

> AI-generated optimization insight

## Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| id | uuid | yes | auto | Primary key |
| insightType | cost_reduction \| performance \| caching \| model_switch \| pattern_elimination \| quality_improvement | yes | - | Type of insight |
| title | string | yes | - | Short insight title |
| description | string | yes | - | Detailed explanation |
| estimatedSavingsUsd | float | yes | - | Projected monthly savings |
| estimatedSavingsPercent | float | yes | - | Projected savings as percentage |
| priority | high \| medium \| low | yes | - | Priority level |
| status | new \| viewed \| accepted \| dismissed | yes | new | Insight status |
| affectedModel | string | yes | - | Model this insight relates to |
| affectedAgent | string | yes | - | Agent this insight relates to |
| analyzeSessionId | string | yes | - | Analysis session that generated this insight |
| evidence | json | yes | - | Supporting data |
| createdAt | datetime | yes | auto | Creation timestamp |
| updatedAt | datetime | yes | auto | Last update timestamp |

## API Endpoints

- `GET /api/insight` — List all
- `POST /api/insight` — Create
- `GET /api/insight/:id` — Get by ID
- `PUT /api/insight/:id` — Update
- `DELETE /api/insight/:id` — Delete
